name: design-website-generator
description: Executor skill for website generation using awesome-design-md design systems. It executes generation, context carry-over, and QA checks, while website-generation-workflow owns top-level orchestration.

commands.name: list-design-systems
commands.description: List all available design systems from awesome-design-md
commands.usage: Use this command to see what design systems are available before starting a generation task

category.description: Filter by category (optional): ai, developer, infrastructure, fintech, enterprise, consumer, automotive

commands.name: recommend-design-system
commands.description: Get AI recommendations for suitable design systems based on requirements
commands.usage: Use this command when starting a new website generation to get design system recommendations

count.description: Number of recommendations to return (default: 5, max: 10)

commands.name: generate-website
commands.description: Generate a complete website using SEQUENTIAL page generation. Each page is generated based on the previous page's context to ensure design and content coherence.
commands.usage: Use this command to generate a website. Follows sequential workflow: Design Selection → Design Confirmation → Sequential Page Generation → Visual QA. Read prompts/sequential-workflow.md for detailed process.

prompt.description: Website requirements description (e.g., 'AI startup landing page with hero, features, pricing sections')

brand.description: Design system brand name (e.g., vercel, claude, stripe). Use list-design-systems to see available options

pages.description: Page types to generate in order (e.g., ['homepage', 'features', 'pricing']). Generated SEQUENTIALLY for coherence.

commands.name: generate-page-structure
commands.description: Plan page structure based on design system and requirements
commands.usage: Use this command to get recommended page structure (sections, navigation, layout) before full generation

pageType.description: Page type: landing, product, pricing, about, contact

requirements.description: Additional requirements or content for the page

commands.name: run-design-qa
commands.description: Run QA checks on generated components to verify design system compliance
commands.usage: Use this command after generation to check if components follow the design system correctly

components.description: List of generated component code strings

designSystem.description: Design system brand name to validate against

envVars.name: LLM_PROVIDER
envVars.description: LLM provider: pptoken, aiberm, crazyrouter, openrouter, anthropic

envVars.name: LLM_MODEL
envVars.description: LLM model to use for generation

params.requirements: Modern AI startup landing page with dark theme

params.prompt: Landing page for AI coding assistant

params.requirements: AI assistant landing with hero, features, testimonials, pricing
